title: The Aesthetic Dimension
subtitle: Toward a Critique of Marxist Aesthetics
author: Herbert Marcuse
excerpt: Herbert Marcuse's final major work offers a critique of orthodox Marxist aesthetics and argues for the emancipatory power of art. Against the demand that art directly reflect political realities, Marcuse insists that art's revolutionary potential lies in its autonomy — its capacity to transcend the given reality and evoke the promise of a liberated existence.
